body.title: Track worker konsole PID at launch — enable xdotool keystroke injection
body.result: worker-launch + inject subcommands added to cc_queue.py. PID recorded to worker_pids.json. xdotool injects to konsole window by PID. Smoke tested.
body.description: When launching a worker terminal via konsole, capture the PID and write it to ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/worker_pids.json keyed by ticket-id. Add a channel.py or cc_queue.py subcommand 'inject <ticket-id> <text>' that uses xdotool type --window $(xdotool search --pid <konsole-pid>) to send keystrokes. Enables designer to unblock an idle worker without requiring manual terminal interaction. Also document this pattern in ClaudeAndAkien repo (getting_started.md or skills_guide.md — worker lifecycle section).
